svg.title: Complete Agile Spec Driven Development with Sprint Planning
svg.desc: Full workflow showing project brief, PRD, sprint pre-planning, architecture/spec, developer/tester approval, epic test design approval, story creation, and sprint planning meeting.
svg.text: Full Workflow from Brief to Sprint Planning Meeting

polygon.style: fill: currentColor; stroke: var(--color-border-secondary); stroke-width: 0.5;;fill:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke:rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.3);color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:0.5px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
